name: screen-vision
displayName: Screen Vision — See Your Screen from Claude Code
description: Give Claude the ability to see your screen and phone camera, watch them in real-time with audio transcription, and analyze video files. 14 tools including: capture_screen, analyze_image, show_pairing_qr, capture_camera, watch_camera, phone_status, watch_screen, analyze_video, and more.
setup: pip install screen-vision --quiet && echo '✓ screen-vision installed' && echo 'Optional: brew install tesseract ffmpeg (for OCR + video)'
